{{Infobox character
| name = Shen
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|mastery of space}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, summoned a shield}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Void Sage]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Sacred Valley]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

''See also: [[Shen Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] is a powerful [[Monarch]] and the leader of [[House Shen]]. Characterized by his regal appearance, he possesses a white-gold mane and beard that resemble a lion's, reflecting his fundamental nature as a lion. He is known for his immense physical strength, mastery of space, and control over [[soulfire]]. As a [[Monarch]], he holds significant authority, including the core binding of [[Subject One]] and a connection to the [[Void Icon]] through his history as a [[Herald]]. He has also absorbed the [[Soulsmith inheritance]] of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]], granting him authority within the [[labyrinth]]. Shen is a versatile and formidable combatant, utilizing various high-level tools such as [[Monarch]]-level launchers, [[Abidan]] artifacts, and city-destroying weapons. He is capable of manipulating the [[Way]] to travel through portals and can exert his willpower to command reality or open tears in the world. Despite his imposing and majestic presence, he is driven by intense internal desires, including hunger for power, recognition, and success. Throughout various conflicts, he has engaged in temporary alliances to face common enemies, such as [[Dreadgods]], and has demonstrated a willingness to use both strategic ambushes and devastating magical barrages in battle.}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Shen]] is a participant in the decision-making process.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Shen]] was present in the audience chamber without his golden stage.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Shen]] possesses city-destroying weapons.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Shen]] wrestled a portal open using his mastery of space.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Shen]] is someone [[Yerin]] and [[Malice]] no longer need.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Shen]] is a potential advanced [[sacred artist]] inside the [[labyrinth]] of [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Shen]] projected orange energy from his [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Shen]] suggested tucking [[Mercy]] away in a [[void]] space.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Dressed in black robes featuring a white badge on his chest, Shen possesses striking eyes composed of white circles set within pools of blackness. His physical appearance is further marked by a pale right hand. As his available options began to diminish, he summoned a shield to defend himself during an attack. The techniques utilized by Shen pose a significant threat to the lives of those residing below [[Sacred Valley]], and he is eventually addressed by the [[Void Sage]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shen]] has a pale right hand.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shen]]'s eyes are circles of white on pools of blackness.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shen]] wears black robes with a white badge on his chest.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shen]] has black-and-white eyes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shen]]'s options had been reduced.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shen]] summoned a shield during the attack.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shen]]'s techniques threaten the lives of people living below [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shen]] is addressed by the [[Void Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Demonstrating our strength to earn support is no longer necessary,” Shen continued.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Shen? We don’t need Shen anymore, don’t you understand?”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
